content:
Hey! Some feedback from me:
Goal
Please reformat N to [[N]] (variable)
Please reformat i to [[i]] (variable)
Please reformat the constants {{A}}, {{B}}, and {{C}}.

Input
Please reformat N to [[N]].

Output
Please reformat N to [[N]].
Please reformat i to [[i]]

Suggestion: Maybe don't tell them how to solve it, just set the statement to a double pyramid?

Constraints
Please reformat to [[N]].
Please reformat constants: {{1}}, {{26}}

Testcases
Your constraint states that N can go up to 26. Maybe include a testcase with N=26 or a higher number like that?

Stub generator:
instead of write print the pyramids, maybe use a loop to write multiple lines since that is the required output format.

Good contribution though.
